title: 4 PCS Silicone Spoons for Cooking, Serving Spoons Large Nonstick Heat Resistant Spoon Multi-Purpose Serving Spoon for Mixing Cooking Frying Baking Stirring (Grey)
features: What You Will Get: You will receive 4 grey silicone spoons in this set. This quantity is perfect for meeting your daily requirements, providing spares, and sharing with others.

Good Quality: Heat resistant spoons are made of soft silicone, especially suitable for non-stick pans, iron pans, ceramic pans and other vulnerable pots. It will not scratch the bottom of the pot, ensuring that your high-quality cookware is properly protected and extends its service life

Easy to clean: The silicone cooking spoon is non-stick and high temperature resistant, and is not easy to adhere to food residue, making it very convenient to clean. You can wash it by hand or put it in the dishwasher to keep your spoon clean and hygienic and extend its service life.

Heat Resistance And Durability: The silicone cooking spoon is naturally durable, Heat resistant up to 480°F,Even without any protected or special treatment,They can last up to ten years and silicone seamless design makes the spoon won’t break or come off like the spoons with the wooden handle.

Widely Applicable: 4 pcs silicone spoon can handle various cooking tasks such as cooking, serving soup, stirring, serving rice, etc. Whether it is used for daily cooking at home, or for parties, BBQs and other occasions, it can provide you with full kitchen support
